memberdef.name: CIC_getset
CICObj_methods
memberdef.initializer:
= { {"reset", (PyCFunction)CICObj_reset, METH_NOARGS, "Reset state to post-create defaults."},
{"reconfigure", (PyCFunction)CICObj_reconfigure, METH_VARARGS, "reconfigure(R) -> None
" "
" "Change the decimation ratio in place; resets all filter state.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import CIC
" " >>> obj = CIC(16)
" " >>> obj.reconfigure(0)
"}, {"decimate", (PyCFunction)CICObj_decimate, METH_VARARGS, "decimate(x) -> ndarray
" "
" "Zero-copy view into pre-allocated output buffer.
" "
" " >>> import numpy as np
" " >>> from doppler import CIC
" " >>> obj = CIC(16)
" " >>> y = obj.decimate(1.0 + 0.0j)
" " >>> y.dtype
" " dtype('complex64')
"}, {"destroy", (PyCFunction)CICObj_destroy, METH_NOARGS, "Release resources."}, {"__enter__", (PyCFunction)CICObj_enter, METH_NOARGS, NULL}, {"__exit__", (PyCFunction)CICObj_exit, METH_VARARGS, NULL}, {NULL} }

memberdef.name: CICObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "resample.CIC", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(CICObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)CICObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create a CIC decimation filter.\n", .tp_methods = CICObj_methods, .tp_getset = CIC_getset, .tp_new = CICObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)CICObj_init, }
